reviews.comment:
1 solo playero para cargar nafta a mil autos en los 2 surtidores que tienen, toda la parsimonia. Siempre hay fila. La peor YPF que conozco. Terminas llegando 3hs tarde a tu destino por esta gente

(Translated by Google)
Only one attendant to pump gas for a thousand cars at their two pumps, and the service is incredibly slow. There's always a line. The worst YPF I've ever been to. You end up arriving three hours late because of these people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZMmV1S0p3EAE
